race.comment: QUOKKA ROCKA (3) sat just off the speed and fought on well here first up, beaten 1.2L over this distance. Placed at Belmont on debut prior, and has more to give. Draws low today and will be tough to beat. PLAYA DEL SOL (9) progressed nicely third-up, beaten just 0.6 lengths over 1200m at Pinjarra Scarpside after stalking the lead. Has to manage a wide gate today, but keeps the in-form Fiore, and she's been kept on the fresh side. Goes close with average luck. BELLE OF BONDI (11) debuts, and Faithfull sticks from a winning Lark Hill trial. On that effort, she deserves a betting watch. LAND OF NOD (6) debuts for the top metro barn. He's also trialled at Lark Hill on three occasions and has the blinkers and a tongue tie on. Tough to risk the yard, and it won't surprise if he goes well. TRAILER TRUCK (4) will be fitter and his early form was good.
